3021220.name: RADIANT ELUSION
3021220.description:
Accelerate towards oblivion in RADIANT ELUSION (光放逃避), the 3D first-person arcade platformer, wherein you search for the Irrecoverable Condition locked behind the virtual gates of the Free Market!

Search for the source of your video game nostalgia and score big by collecting the shimmering skulls of humanity, a multitude of other finite collectables, unlock up to 4 unreal abilities and experience the fantastical reality of computer interactive entertainment across ten kaleidoscopic perspectives on video game and contemporary culture!

You are hereby invited to gaze into the RADIANT ELUSION of bright pixelated 3D-grapichs all while the electronic soundtrack numbs your corporeal self!

This product includes:

  • Combo-Collectathon-system: the faster you pick up the games finite collectables the greater the score, but what you lose you lose forever, no run is the same!

  • Surfing-mechanics when in contact with angled geometry!

  • Speeding through virtual void via Shifting/Dashing!

  • 4 different unlockable abilities with multiple uses that enhance intractability and moving around 3D-space!

  • A Hubworld for interactive and the possibility for nonlinear level progression!

  • 2 game endings!

  • Local Time Attack-mode that saves and displays the best completion time of each of the games levels in the name of Accelerationism!

  • Narrative that is interwoven with the gameplay systems, its mechanics, and our civilizations current times of moving forward backwards!

  • An euphoric electronic soundtrack and quirky VFX/SFX for satisfying audio-visual feedback!

Tips:

  • The game autosaves after completing a level!

  • Play how you want, speedy, exploratory, or both at the same time!
